hypothesis: Crystalline Li–Si–X alloys with a Li-ion channel radius slope at most 0.45 Å per 100% state-of-charge (between fully lithiated and delithiated states) will exhibit total volumetric expansion no greater than 100% and capacity retention of at least 85% after 200 C/2 cycles in coin-cell half-cells, whereas alloys with larger slopes will fail to meet both metrics.
